programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programs.title: Medical Rookies
programs.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by JENNIFER KEYTE.

programs.title: NBC Today
programs.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programs.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programs.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programs.title: Escape To The Country
programs.desc: Today's couple want to spend their retirement in the peace and quiet of the Scottish borders and Alistair Appleton is on hand to help them find the perfect pad for their 350k budget.

programs.title: Creek To Coast
programs.desc: We're on the fairway with Lions favourite, Cam Rayner. Braving the rain for a flathead bonanza. Australia's best Hipcamp and cooking up the crispiest campfire potatoes you've ever tasted.
